message:
feat(html_export): implement MessageGroup rendering with tool badge overflow

- Add render_message_groups() for consolidated group rendering
- Add render_message_group() for individual groups with proper ARIA
- Add render_tool_badges_with_overflow() with MAX_VISIBLE_BADGES limit
- Add render_single_tool_badge() with Lucide SVG icons
- Add get_tool_lucide_icon() for tool-specific icon mapping
- Update mod.rs exports to include render_message_groups
- Add comprehensive tests for all new functions (41 tests pass)

Implements br-27t2: Task 3 - Update renderer.rs to handle MessageGroup rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
